creator: freebsd@skysmurf.nl
text:
Created attachment 169835
SVN diff that modifies MAINTAINER and adds mirror to MASTER_SITES

x11/xdialog has been orphaned and I volunteer to take maintainership.

The attached SVN diff modifies MAINTAINER and adds my mirror to MASTER_SITES.

The port is up to date, Portlint reports OK and a build log can be found at:
http://www.skysmurf.nl/~fonz/tmp/xdialog.log
